title: Chief Scientific Advisers Network in Action
body: "This report delivers an insight into the impacts of Chief Scientific Advisers (CSAs) across the UK government. This report provides an overview of the role of a CSA and the CSA Network more generally, the importance of the science and technology advice that the network delivers to the UK government and a breakdown of key areas where the network has achieved impact. Additionally, this report includes four case studies in which the contributions of CSAs have resulted in meaningful impact.  "
